business_ideas.idea: Acquisition.com - buy minority/majority stakes in businesses, scale with capital and operational expertise
Mosey Media - business education content (books, courses, YouTube) sold at low price
Enchanted Fairies - children photography franchise model scaled from single location to 36 locations
No-money-down acquisition structure where acquirer takes equity upside above target growth

predictions.text: Build billion-dollar company proving people perform better with praise-based cultures than punishment-based
Majority-stake businesses will outperform minority stakes due to operational control ability
